en: "You shall make the altar of acacia wood, five cubits long and five cubits broad. The altar shall be square, and its height shall be three cubits.
zh: “你要用皂莢木做祭壇，這壇要四方的：長兩公尺兩公寸，寬兩公尺兩公寸，高一公尺三公寸。

en: And you shall make horns for it on its four corners; its horns shall be of one piece with it, and you shall overlay it with bronze.
zh: 要在祭壇的四拐角做四個角，角要與祭壇連在一塊，祭壇要包上銅。

en: You shall make pots for it to receive its ashes, and shovels and basins and forks and fire pans. You shall make all its utensils of bronze.
zh: 要做盆，用來收去祭壇上的灰，又要做鏟、盤、肉叉和火鼎；祭壇上的一切器具，你都要用銅來做。

en: You shall also make for it a grating, a network of bronze, and on the net you shall make four bronze rings at its four corners.
zh: 要為壇做一個銅網，網的四拐角上要做四個銅環。

en: And you shall set it under the ledge of the altar so that the net extends halfway down the altar.
zh: 要把網安在祭壇下面的圍腰板之下，使網從下面直達到祭壇的半腰。

en: And you shall make poles for the altar, poles of acacia wood, and overlay them with bronze.
zh: 又要為祭壇做槓，就是皂莢木的槓，要包上銅。

en: And the poles shall be put through the rings, so that the poles are on the two sides of the altar when it is carried.
zh: 槓要穿在祭壇的環子裡，抬祭壇的時候，槓就在祭壇的兩邊；

en: You shall make it hollow, with boards. As it has been shown you on the mountain, so shall it be made.
zh: 你要用木板做祭壇，祭壇是空心的。你要照著在山上指示你的去做。

en: "You shall make the court of the tabernacle. On the south side the court shall have hangings of fine twined linen a hundred cubits long for one side.
zh: “你要做會幕的院子。在南面，即向南的一面，要用撚的細麻為院子做帷幔，每邊長四十四公尺。

en: Its twenty pillars and their twenty bases shall be of bronze, but the hooks of the pillars and their fillets shall be of silver.
zh: 帷幔的柱子要二十根，銅插座二十個。柱子上的鉤子和桁子都是銀的。

en: And likewise for its length on the north side there shall be hangings a hundred cubits long, its pillars twenty and their bases twenty, of bronze, but the hooks of the pillars and their fillets shall be of silver.
zh: 北面也是一樣，要有四十四公尺長的帷幔，帷幔的柱子二十根，銅插座二十個，柱子上的鉤子和桁子都是銀的。

en: And for the breadth of the court on the west side there shall be hangings for fifty cubits, with ten pillars and ten bases.
zh: 院子的西面，也要有帷幔，寬二十二公尺。帷幔的柱子十根，插座十個。

en: The breadth of the court on the front to the east shall be fifty cubits.
zh: 院子的東面，要有二十二公尺寬。

en: The hangings for the one side of the gate shall be fifteen cubits, with their three pillars and three bases.
zh: 門一面的帷幔要六公尺六公寸，帷幔的柱子三根，插座三個。

en: On the other side the hangings shall be fifteen cubits, with their three pillars and three bases.
zh: 門另一面的帷幔也要六公尺六公寸，帷幔的柱子三根，插座三個。

en: For the gate of the court there shall be a screen twenty cubits long, of blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen, embroidered with needlework. It shall have four pillars and with them four bases.
zh: 院子的大門要有門簾，長九公尺，是用藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻，用刺繡的手工織成，柱子四根，插座四個。

en: All the pillars around the court shall be filleted with silver. Their hooks shall be of silver, and their bases of bronze.
zh: 院子周圍一切柱子，都要用銀桁子相連起來。柱子上的鉤子是銀的，插座是銅的。

en: The length of the court shall be a hundred cubits, the breadth fifty, and the height five cubits, with hangings of fine twined linen and bases of bronze.
zh: 院子要長四十四公尺，寬二十二公尺，高兩公尺兩公寸；帷幔是細麻撚的，插座是銅的。

en: All the utensils of the tabernacle for every use, and all its pegs and all the pegs of the court, shall be of bronze.
zh: 會幕中為禮拜用的一切器具和釘子，以及院子裡的一切釘子，都是銅的。

en: "You shall command the people of Israel that they bring to you pure beaten olive oil for the light, that a lamp may regularly be set up to burn.
zh: “你要吩咐以色列民把打成的純橄欖油拿來給你，是為點燈用的，使燈常常點著。

en: In the tent of meeting, outside the veil that is before the testimony, Aaron and his sons shall tend it from evening to morning before the LORD. It shall be a statute forever to be observed throughout their generations by the people of Israel.
zh: 在會幕中法櫃前的幔子外，亞倫和他的子孫，從晚上到早晨，要常在耶和華面前料理這燈。這要作以色列人世世代代的定例。”
